text:
EXPLANATION: The "Llama 3.2 Community License Agreement" is a real, publicly available legal document provided by Meta Platforms, Inc. for the use of their Llama 3.2 model family. It is widely cited in technical documentation and research papers as the governing license for these models.

LINK: https://www.llama.com/llama-license/
FOUND_TITLE: Llama 3.2 Community License Agreement
FOUND_AUTHORS: Meta Platforms, Inc
FOUND_YEAR: 2024
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
